title: SQL: multi-attribute GROUP BY may ignore sortedness
poc: create table sorted (a int, b int);
select a,b from sorted group by a,b;
select a,b from sorted group by b,a;
key_bug_features: multi-attribute GROUP BY ignores sorted order
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), category INT);
SELECT category, value FROM test_table GROUP BY category, value ORDER BY category, value;
